nodes.label: AI as sounding board for ideas
nodes.grounding_span: it helps me see it from a different angle

nodes.label: AI as summarizer of chaotic notes
nodes.grounding_span: create summaries of feedback notes i'm given but haven't taken, which helps becuase the notes are often chaotic

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: use it for ideation and suggestions for writing

nodes.label: Personal voice and authentic relationship maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: I want to ensure my voice is maintained so that i can keep an authentic relationship

nodes.label: AI cross-context personalization contamination
nodes.label_negative: Clean separation of personal and work AI contexts
nodes.grounding_span: it gets really stuck into personalization across conversations, like integrating tone, languages, and ideas from creative projects

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI writing quality matching or exceeding human
nodes.grounding_span: it is not as good as me yet in many respects at writing

nodes.label: AI market impact on content creation jobs
nodes.label_negative: Stable demand for human content creators
nodes.grounding_span: browsing the internet and seeing so much clearly Ai generated content has shown me that that might not matter to a lot of people who used to pay money to human content creators

nodes.label: Creative inspiration and ideation
nodes.grounding_span: it helps me see it from a different angle

nodes.label: Efficiency and reduced cognitive load
nodes.grounding_span: it distilled it down to some conise ideas i was able to use

nodes.label: Authentic human connection and trust
nodes.grounding_span: keep an authentic relationship with people i mostly communicate with over email

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: it is not as good as me yet in many respects at writing

nodes.label: Job security and skill relevance
nodes.grounding_span: i work in a state job that feels slightly more secure than other content creation/marketing jobs

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for meeting notes
nodes.grounding_span: it distilled it down to some conise ideas i was able to use to ensure i applied all the feedback

nodes.label: Frustration with AI cross-context personalization
nodes.grounding_span: it gets really stuck into personalization across conversations

nodes.label: Confidence in own writing superiority over AI
nodes.grounding_span: it is not as good as me yet in many respects at writing

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing human writers
nodes.grounding_span: browsing the internet and seeing so much clearly Ai generated content has shown me that that might not matter to a lot of people who used to pay money to human content creators

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI summaries
nodes.grounding_span: i suspect it might at some point start using it more to read things like email threads, white papers, market research power points, etc and summarizing it

nodes.label: Iterative exploration — uses back-and-forth to refine understanding and generate ideas
nodes.grounding_span: try variations of this a couple of times to see if anything inspires me

nodes.label: Curiosity-driven exploration when at baseline performance
nodes.grounding_span: i start having it work on unrelated things just because i enjoy chasing whatever feels fun in the moment
